meta.title: Golden Beauty Studio — Sabaneta
meta.description: Specialist nail studio in Sabaneta, Antioquia. Acrylic, polygel, builder gel and dipping by appointment.

hero.body: A specialist studio for built nails — acrylic, polygel and builder gel. Every appointment is a curated space for design, technique and precision.

lookbook.body: A selection of recent pieces. Each look notes the technique used and the estimated duration. Tap any image to see it in detail.

servicios.body: Listed prices are the base. Complex designs and nail art are quoted per nail before the appointment starts — always upfront, never at the end.
servicios.footnote: Simple designs included. Complex designs from $3,000 COP per nail. External system removal: +$25,000 COP.

diccionario.body: Each technique has its own logic, duration and ideal nail type. A quick guide so you arrive at your appointment knowing what to ask for — and why.
diccionario.fallback: We'll walk you through it at your appointment. Ask the artist which system best fits your nail.

items.name: Acrylic
items.body: A mix of polymer and liquid monomer molded onto the nail. The classic system: maximum strength and sculpted shape via filing. Ideal for long extensions and architectural designs.

items.name: Polygel
items.body: A moldable paste-gel applied with a dual-form. Lighter than acrylic, feels natural and allows clean extensions. LED-cured — no odor. Recommended for thin nails or anyone seeking discretion.

items.name: Builder gel
items.body: A thick gel cured under UV/LED. A structural layer that protects the natural nail without extending it much. Polished finish, high durability and minimal wear on removal.

team.name: Valentina M.
team.quote: Technique is learned; the eye is trained appointment by appointment.

team.name: Laura R.
team.quote: Every hand tells a different story. I just frame it.

estudio.title2_em: to sit, look at your hands and breathe.
estudio.leadItalic: Golden comes from the idea that a well-done nail is a design object. Not an express service, not a chore — a deliberate pause.
estudio.body1: We work with built techniques — acrylic, polygel, builder gel, dipping — because they hold their shape for three weeks. One technique per appointment, one client at a time, no double-booking.
estudio.body2: The studio sits in Sabaneta, a small and carefully kept space: two seats, soft light, visible products, sealed tools. Nothing decorative that doesn't serve.

stats.s: Sealed in front of the client

hygiene.intro: What others treat as optional, we treat as non-negotiable. You'll see it every visit.
items: Class B autoclave sterilization between clients.
Disposable files, buffers and sticks, opened in front of you.
Every material is opened in front of the client.
Surface and UV lamp cleaned between appointments.
Kiara Sky, The Gel Bottle, Akzéntz, Aprés.
Zero aggressive cuticle cutting. Push only.

address.label: Address
address.line3: 80 m from Parque de Sabaneta, second floor.
